entities.name: GROUNDNUT
entities.description: The peanut plant, the primary subject of the study regarding disease resistance.

entities.name: FOLIAR FUNGAL DISEASES
entities.description: Fungal diseases affecting the leaves of groundnut plants.

entities.name: STEM AND POD ROTS
entities.description: Diseases causing decay in the stems and pods of groundnut.

entities.name: WILT
entities.description: A disease causing the groundnut plant to wilt and lose vigor.

entities.name: POD YIELD
entities.description: The quantity of pods produced, which is reduced by various diseases.

entities.name: AFLATOXIN CONTAMINATION
entities.description: Contamination of groundnuts by aflatoxins, leading to quality issues.

entities.name: RESISTANCE
entities.description: The capacity of groundnut varieties to resist fungal and bacterial diseases.

entities.name: FUNGAL DISEASES
entities.description: Diseases caused by fungal pathogens in groundnut.

entities.name: BACTERIAL DISEASES
entities.description: Diseases caused by bacterial pathogens in groundnut.

entities.name: AGRONOMIC TRAITS
entities.description: General agricultural characteristics of groundnut resistance sources.
